output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-144","author":"MoorvaleMarketUser","text":"URGENT: I'm being asked to verify my account by sending a photo of my ID card and a copy of my bank statement to 'support@secure-checks.net'. They say this is required to unlock my seller badge. The link they sent looks official but feels weird because it asks for sensitive data via email.
